si.t: The Sheet on your left is the core sheet that all newly created sheets are based off of.
1. In order to edit the Core Time Card you MUST have the
2. SAVE the ORIGINAL sheet before EDITING.
3. The total size of all the columns and rows must not change.
This is due to how the PDF formats the sheets allowing
for all the sheets to show up side by side.
4. The program currently counts cards based on if there is something in cell IJ.
5. You cannot add more rows or collumns in the sheet. The core code is set up to copy the first 45 rows, and copy
6. Program sorts names based on cell 2D.
7. If there is anything in this list that needs to be changed let Christopher Larsen know.
My goal is to eleminate this whole list and have this time card be fully editable.
8. Cell M4 gets the date field filled into it
1. If you want to lock/unlock a cell from editing select the cell, right click,
go to Format Cells..., go to Protection,
check lock if you want to cell to be locked/uncheck lock if
you want them to be able to edit the cell
2. I like to make all editable cells a different color then the
3. When the sheet on the left is changed delete all existing sheets
